title: Bridge Essay: Mental imagery and visual attentional templates: A dissociation.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Imaginal** (Phase 10) with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Links Imaginal to mechanistic neuroscience through Mental, imagery, and, visual, attentional.

**Mental imagery and visual attentional templates: Adissociation.** — Cortex. PMID: 37967476. DOI: 10.1016/j.cortex.2023.09.014. There is agrowing interest in the relationship between mental images and attentional templates as both are considered pictorial representations that involve similar neural mechanisms. Here, we investigated the role of mental imagery in the automatic implementation of attentional templates and their effect on involuntary attention.
